notes: Total domestic two-wheeler retail + wholesale sales (motorcycles + scooters + mopeds), all OEMs, India. FY26 / FY27 reserved for industry forecasts (ICRA / CRISIL / SIAM outlook) — leave null until a forecast source is selected.

verification.method: SIAM domestic 2W wholesale sales. FY25 cross-verified: 19.6M units, +9.1% YoY — the segment’s best in six fiscals, below the FY19 peak of 21.1M. Earlier years are SIAM annual-series figures.
